non_compete.value: Party B shall not engage in competitive activities with Didi without prior written notice and confirmation.
non_compete.exact_text: 10.4.11 In consideration of the fact that Party B may have access to the relevant trade secrets of Didi during the cooperation, Party B or Party B's any affiliate cooperates with any entity competitive with Didi (including but not limited to Meituan, CAR, Yongche, izu, Caocao, Dida) in any form without prior written notice to and confirmation by Didi;
